error.message: The parameters dictionary contains a null entry for parameter 'partnerId' of non-nullable type 'System.Int32' for method 'System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1[System.Web.Mvc.ActionResult] SendIteratePartnerEmail(Int32, System.String, System.String, System.DateTime, Boolean, System.Web.HttpPostedFileBase)' in 'Generic.Controllers.PartnerController'. An optional parameter must be a reference type, a nullable type, or be declared as an optional parameter. Parameter name: parameters
